feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dear SAP Community i need a validation for restricted an warehouse for same SAP users
entry.content: Dear SAP Community i need a validation for restricted an warehouse for my same SAP b1 users please provide me stored procedures for the same..

entry.title: Add new folder tabs to BP form - B1 crashed when I close this form
entry.content:
Hi,

One folder tab has been created in the BP Master screen along with a grid using add-on.

 

Steps

1. Selecting One customer .

2. Going to newly created tab.

3. Clicking refresh menu .

4. Clicking OK button in BP master will close SAP B1.

SA B1 Version : SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.200) FP 2208 (64-bit)

entry.title: How to check the actual consume memory of the Company DB on SBO
entry.content:
Hi There, I have a performance issue on my SAP Business One 10.0 for MSSQL. I suppose it might be a Memory issue.

And I know this document give the suggest / plan hardware requirements Hardware Requirements Guide for SAP Business One(PDF)

But I need the ACTUAL consume memory of MSSQL server.

Where can I find the tool to figure out the actual consume memory of MSSQL server?

And I can see which DB, which table consume the largest memory?

BR

Robin

entry.title: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content:
Hi, we are testing at the moment so trying to find out the issues before we go live. We have migrated our SAP B1 v10 SQL server which was in house into Azure as a virtual Windows server. We plan to use Azure remote desktop for all the users to gain access. All users currently connect to a in house Windows Terminal server so hopefully the experience will be similar.

My question is regarding how to set up the Azure Remote Desktop. I have installed the SAP Client as well as the DI API app. My issue is we want to test it back to the live server, is it possible for the client which is on a non domain PC to connect to a domain server? There doesn't seem to be a way to make the authorisation across separate subnets and domains. Any advise / information on setting things up in Azure would be most welcome.

entry.title: SAP B1 - Prevent auto opening when saving document as excel
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any way to prevent the excel file that is generated when saving a report/document from SAP B1?

I have tried the suggestion of removing the AutoOpen file that is located in C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\ExclDocs but that doesn't seem to work.

The files are not opening when saved as xls or csv but they are opening automatically when saved as xlsx.

Any advice would be appreciated.

Thank you,

Spyros

entry.title: Fetching UserName based on repeated item's InternalKey.
entry.content:
Hey!

I'm writing this question, because even after countless tries and workaraound attempts, I still couln't solve this issue. 

I am using ApprovalRequest1 data variable. My issue is, that I want to show the UserCode or UserName field for each approver who made a decision, but only the InternalKey of the users are present in the data. Since the text box is in repeat, I don't know how to fetch and store the data from Users endpoint for each line of the repeated data. My goal is to replace all potential repeated items' InternalKey with the matching User's UserCode or UserName.

I had troubles before working with sub-arrays, and this time too it gave me a troublesome time. Here are some images for easier understading (the on the second one we can see my best attempt so far.):

entry.title: Query asset history sheet
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We need to blind fix asset report in crystal report. We have trouble calculating depreciation value for double decline method. There any query for function to calculate depreciation using double declining methods?

Thank You

Regards,

Sabrina

entry.title: why users without access to invoices have access to DRAFT invoices (those pending authorization)
entry.content:
Hi, 

if I have users, dedicated to approve purchase orders, obviously, you have to give this user access to Draft documents, BUT, this user now have access to ALL marketing documents like invoices, not respecting the access policy.

Is this something we can avoid ?

entry.title: HSN code wise consolidated report into SAP Business One SQL Version
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need query report of HSN code wise consolidated report into SAP Business One SQL Version. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Cannot open Microsoft Outlook instance; check that Microsoft Outlook is installed
entry.content:
Hi All

Please advise how to solve as suddenly our client cannot send out Customer Statement via Email to Customer in version 10 PL2105.

SAP Note 836051 mentioned in this thread has been removed.  

Solved: Cannot open Microsoft Outlook instance - SAP Community

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports - Image Formatting
entry.content:
We have a SAP Business One license.

We made a Crystal Report for our Quotes, with the aim of adding JPG or bitmap images to the end of the document. 

In Crystal Report preview, the images look good but when we create a PDF then the images become skewed, stretched or no longer fit on the A4 page.

Would anyone have a solution to this? Or can anyone provide some documentation on Crystal Report image manipulation?

Thanks in advance SAP community!

entry.title: Field ISDfCSTEx in ADM1: where is it managed?
entry.content:
Hello guys,
I've had a problem try to saving a "Company details" update having the blocking message below:
"Value not valid; value points to invalid or nonexistent object".

Investigating, I found the field ADM1.ISDfCSTEx, that is related to the ODCI table, which had a value present in the linked table but not compliant to the Country of the company and that causing this saving block.

Please, could someone tell me in which GUI/Interface I should find this field?
I've to understand where the field is managed, but I looked into Company details, general settings and document settings and I didn't find it.

Thank you!!

entry.title: Hello Support I want to add Invoice With Branch Using SDK DI C# ?
Service layer Attachment2 error
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using the Service layer POST /Attachment2 endpoint to upload files using PHP curl but I'm having an error.  Below is my code

        $curl = curl_init();

        curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
        CURLOPT_URL => 'https://xx.xx.xx.xx:50000/b1s/v1/Attachments2',
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
                
        CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,  // Disable SSL certificate verification
        CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => false,  // Optionally, disable host verification
        
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => array('filename'=> new CURLFILE('path/to/testing.jpg')),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
            'Cookie: '. $oData->getCookieStr()
        ),
        ));

        $response = curl_exec($curl);
        
        if (curl_errno($curl)) {
            dd('Error:' . curl_error($curl));
        } else {
            dd($response);
        }

        curl_close($curl);

and here are the results:

"error" : {

      "code" : 404,

      "message" : {

         "lang" : "en-us",

         "value" : "Create File Error: C:\\Windows\\TEMP\\ServiceLayer\\Attachments2/C:/Users/username/Desktop/testing.jpg"

      }

Has anyone experienced this? Thank you

entry.title: Add-on not visible in SAP Business One with browser access
entry.content:
I've developed an add-on using the Extension Registration Data Center (Extension Package), following the instructions in the document [How to Package and Deploy SAP Business One Extensions for Lightweight Deployment].

The add-on works fine in FP 2202 and 2405, but it doesn't appear in FP 2208.

Does anyone know what could be causing this issue or if I'm missing something?"

entry.title: This entry already exists in the following tables (Contacts) (OCPR) (ODBC -2035) [Message 131-183]
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

When adding a business partner to the business partner master data, I get the error "This entry already exists in the following tables (Contacts) (OCPR) (ODBC -2035) [Message 131-183]". Can you please help?

Thank you,

Regards.

entry.title: SAP Upgradation Error
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We recently upgraded SAP from version 9.3 to version 10 with the latest PL. During the upgrade, we encountered an error. Following the SAP note, we removed the BP address UDF in version 9.3, and the upgrade was completed successfully.

However, after upgrading the SAP database to version 10 without the UDF, we are now facing an issue. When attempting to recreate the BP address UDF, we are receiving an error stating that the entry already exists.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue? We need the UDF as we have important data stored in the deleted UDF.

 
Attached Error.
 
Regards
Krishna Varma

entry.title: How to change sld DB details in the server
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Could you please advise how we can change the sld database server details through XML file ?

Thanks & Regards,

Krishna V

entry.title: Configuración mail Confirmacion SII
entry.content: Como se configura el envio de correo cuando se usa servidores de correo en  Exchange

entry.title: SAP B1 9.3PL11 DI Create a draft of accounts receivable invoice using the shipped goods account
entry.content:
I need to create a draft of the accounts receivable invoice based on the delivery status


But after creation, it was found that the account using shipped goods in the accounting label was not automatically selected


The actual shipment is consistent with the selected shipment product account


I tried to set the option to use a shipping account when creating a draft of the accounts receivable invoice,
But it has no effect
Invoice.UseShpdGoodsAct = SAPbobsCOM.BoYesNoEnum.tYES;
